languages.text: Центральный генератор таится в недрах лагеря экспедиции. Нужно найти его, чтобы Эоганн мог совершить необходимые обряды для его пробуждения.
The central generator lies deep within the research camp. You must find it so Eogunn can perform the necessary rites to awaken it.
languages.original_text: Центральный генератор таится в недрах лагеря экспедиции. Нужно найти его, чтобы Эоганн мог совершить необходимые обряды для его пробуждения.

traits.locale_text: The central generator lies deep within the research camp. You must find it so Eogunn can perform the necessary rites to awaken it.
The central generator lies deep within the research camp. You must find it so Eogunn can perform the necessary rites to awaken it.
The central generator lies deep within the research camp. You must find it so Eogunn can perform the necessary rites to awaken it.

languages.text: Der Zentralgenerator steht irgendwo im Forschungslager. Du musst ihn finden, damit ihn Eogunn mit den erforderlichen Riten erwecken kann.
languages.original_text: The central generator lies deep within the research camp. You must find it so Eogunn can perform the necessary rites to awaken it.

traits.locale_text: Der Zentralgenerator steht irgendwo im Forschungslager. Du musst ihn finden, damit ihn Eogunn mit den erforderlichen Riten erwecken kann.

languages.text: Le générateur se trouve au cœur du camp de recherche. Trouvez-le afin qu'Eogunn puisse effectuer les rites qui permettront son éveil.
languages.original_text: The central generator lies deep within the research camp. You must find it so Eogunn can perform the necessary rites to awaken it.

traits.locale_text: Le générateur se trouve au cœur du camp de recherche. Trouvez-le afin qu'Eogunn puisse effectuer les rites qui permettront son éveil.

languages.text: 中央发电机在研究营地的深处。你必须找到它，以便伊奥贡执行必要的仪式将其唤醒。
languages.original_text: The central generator lies deep within the research camp. You must find it so Eogunn can perform the necessary rites to awaken it.

traits.locale_text: 中央发电机在研究营地的深处。你必须找到它，以便伊奥贡执行必要的仪式将其唤醒。

languages.text: El generador central está en lo más profundo del campamento de investigación. Encuéntralo para que Eogunn celebre los ritos necesarios y lo despierte.
languages.original_text: The central generator lies deep within the research camp. You must find it so Eogunn can perform the necessary rites to awaken it.

traits.locale_text: El generador central está en lo más profundo del campamento de investigación. Encuéntralo para que Eogunn celebre los ritos necesarios y lo despierte.

languages.text: 中央発電機は研究キャンプの奥深くにある。エオグンがそれを目覚めさせるために必要な儀式を行えるように、あなたはそれを見つけなければならない。
languages.original_text: The central generator lies deep within the research camp. You must find it so Eogunn can perform the necessary rites to awaken it.

languages.text: Merkezî jeneratör, araştırma kampının derinliklerinde yer alıyor. Eogunn onu uyandırmak için gerekli ayinleri yapabilsin diye jeneratörü bulmalısın.
languages.original_text: The central generator lies deep within the research camp. You must find it so Eogunn can perform the necessary rites to awaken it.

traits.locale_text: Merkezî jeneratör, araştırma kampının derinliklerinde yer alıyor. Eogunn onu uyandırmak için gerekli ayinleri yapabilsin diye jeneratörü bulmalısın.
